label: History — periods & events
description: Time period, figures, or turning points (content, not art style).
prompt: Historical subject: clear period-appropriate setting, one focal event or figure, museum-quality clarity, no readable text or labels in the image

label: Chemistry — molecules & lab
prompt: Chemistry subject: ball-and-stick or space-filling molecules, lab glassware, or reaction diagram suggestion, clean scientific illustration, no readable formulas or text

label: Mathematics — shapes & structure
description: Geometry, graphs, or spatial ideas as visuals.
prompt: Mathematics subject: geometric shapes, coordinate grid or graph suggestion, spatial relationships, crisp instructional look, no readable equations or numbers

label: Biology — life science
prompt: Biology subject: cross-section or diagram-style life science, cellular or organism focus, clear educational focal point, no readable labels

label: Physics — forces & energy
prompt: Physics subject: forces, motion vectors, waves, or simple apparatus suggested schematically, high-contrast educational poster feel, no readable text

label: Geography — places & terrain
description: Landforms, climate, regions, or human–environment ideas.
prompt: Geography subject: landscape emphasizing terrain, climate, or settlement pattern, map-like clarity without readable labels, natural colors

label: Spanish — scenes & culture
description: Contexts for Spanish vocabulary and conversation.
prompt: Spanish learning: everyday scene or cultural context suitable for Spanish study, clear focal action, Latin America or Spain-neutral setting, no text in the image

label: English — literacy & scenes
description: Reading, writing, or everyday English contexts.
prompt: English learning: classroom, reading, conversation, or everyday life scene supporting English study, one clear idea, no text in the image

label: Phrases — situational chunks
description: Common expressions in a concrete situation.
prompt: Phrase learning: one clear everyday situation that matches a spoken phrase or dialog cue, natural body language, no speech bubbles or text

label: Idioms — literal vs figurative hook
description: Visual pun or contrast to remember figurative language.
prompt: Idiom card: playful contrast between literal and figurative meaning, single memorable visual joke, friendly tone, no text in the image

label: Vocabulary — term to image
description: One word or definition → one clear picture.
prompt: Vocabulary: one unambiguous object, action, or concept on a simple background, educational clarity, no text in the image

label: STEM — relationships & flow
description: Processes, systems, or comparisons across STEM.
prompt: STEM concept: clean diagram suggesting steps, inputs and outputs, or simple comparison, soft colors, arrows or connectors implied, no readable text

label: Sequence — order of events
prompt: Sequence or timeline: left-to-right or vertical stages with simple icons or scenes, infographic clarity, no dates or readable text

label: Compare — A vs B
prompt: Comparison: two subjects side by side with obvious visual contrast, balanced layout, simple background, no labels
